reviews.review_description: It's a lot like a taxi driver game I bought cause it puts you right into the ambulance vehicle but it moved way too slow compared to the taxi game I didn't get far before I gave up on the road to my destination where I guess I was going to pick up the victim

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for the feedback. We are glad you felt immersed in the vehicle, but we hear you on the speed issue. Ambulances are heavy, but gameplay should still be fun! We are currently looking into tweaking the acceleration and top speed to make the drive to the victim faster and more exciting in the next update. Thanks for giving it a try!

reviews.review_description: I would give this 0 stars if I could. I start playing and once I put the oximeter on the person’s finger, it won’t progress. There is no indication or sign of what to do next. Not only that, the body moves unnaturally on the stretcher. Try pushing the body on the stretcher into the ambulance and they slide. There’s no way to secure the body either.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thank you for the honest feedback. I'm sorry to hear you've encountered these issues. The progression bug after using the oximeter is something we are investigating immediately to provide a fix. We also appreciate your notes on the stretcher physics and body securing mechanics—improving these interactions is definitely on our roadmap to make the game more realistic. We hope you'll give it another try after our next update!

reviews.review_description: Absolute buggy mess. Wish could get refund

developer_response.body: We are sorry to learn that your experience with Ambulance Life was affected by technical issues. We understand the frustration this can cause and sincerely regret that the game did not meet your expectations. Please know that our team is actively working on improvements and bug fixes, and we value your feedback as part of that process.

reviews.review_description: The game is great until you finish it when you finish it it resets you

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We're glad you enjoyed the game. The reset is intended, but we understand how it might be frustrating. We're always looking for ways to improve the experience, so we'll take your input into account for future updates

reviews.review_title: Saving lives! Just don't drop them
reviews.review_description:
Video review here:

https://youtu.be/n2lccVUkqjU?si=_Y4P0FsX5N2885zS

Things go a bit janky sometimes, but it does what it promises and there aren't many ambulance simulators in VR, so if you're into saving lives then give it a go!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback. We are continuously working on improving our game! 😊

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love "Ambulance Life VR"! 🚑 The gameplay is incredibly immersive, as you drive the ambulance to patients in need and utilize a range of medical tools like pulse oximeters, neck braces, and shock devices. The attention to detail when handling emergencies, from placing the patient on a stretcher to sealing the ambulance doors, makes every moment feel intense and real. It's not just about driving; it’s about making quick, critical decisions to save lives. This game has truly elevated my VR experience, and I can't recommend it enough!

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description: This one gives me motion sick after 5 minutes. I had to deleat it straight away!

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that you experienced motion sickness! VR comfort can vary from person to person. We're continuously working on improving comfort settings and optimizing the experience. Your feedback is valuable, and we appreciate you sharing it with us

reviews.review_description: This is a Very great game. I also tried another ambulance vr game and it wasn't great. This is better, but i think they could add a horn to the ambulance and different types of models

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback. Enjoy the game! 😊
